Toxicity modelOutputModel definition
TOX_ER_filterToxic (48 %)Qualitative assessment of estrogen receptor toxicity in rats.
TOX_MUT_97 + 1537PositiveQualitative assessment of mutagenicity of the pure compound in TA97 and/or TA1537 strains of S. typhimurium.
TOX_MUT_m97 + 1537PositiveQualitative assessment of mutagenicity of the compound and its microsomal rat liver metabolites in TA97 and/or TA1537 strains of S. typhimurium.
TOX_MUT_m98PositiveQualitative assessment of mutagenicity of the compound and its microsomal rat liver metabolites in TA98 strain of S. typhimurium.
